name: IRC_CAND_MERGE_LOGS
description:
To retrieve the original candidate number of a merged candidate at a given point of time.

Also this table can be reuse for the purpose of auditing of merge candidate action.

columns.Name: CAND_MERGE_LOG_ID
columns.Comments: It contains the primary key of the table. Its a auto generated number.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: It contains the entitly id from where the audit has been orignated

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: It contains entity type from the module where audit is generated

columns.Name: ALPHA_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: It stores the person id of the candidate which will get retained post merge.

columns.Name: ALPHA_CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: It stores the candidate number of the candidate which will get retained post merge.

columns.Name: BETA_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: It stores the person id of the candidate which will get discarded  post merge.

columns.Name: BETA_CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: It stores the candidate number of the candidate which will get discarded post merge.

columns.Name: BETA_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Captures start of the time or end of previous same entity end time

columns.Name: BETA_END_DATE
columns.Comments: It contains the timestamp when beta candidate entity was discarded.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the action like ORA_MERGED or ORA_DELETED

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO
columns.Comments: Optional field to persist the logs

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
